design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. Color exists only to guide action. High contrast for readability of dense financial data. Balance-first design with top-down hierarchy.

layout.surfaces: Flat backgrounds with 1px solid border (border-gray-200), no shadows by default. Hover states introduce subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-sm.

components.navigation: Sticky top nav (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with solid bottom border. Includes Logo, context switcher (MBS vs MCORP), and Admin/Viewer role indicator.
components.kpi_cards: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Flat borders, no shadows. Large font-mono for numbers. Badge indicators for MoM/WoW trends.
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Striped rows or border-b only. text-sm font-mono for monetary values. Color-coded badges for aging buckets.
components.charts: Recharts via Shadcn. Use sorted horizontal bar charts for leaderboard. Stacked bar charts for Aging Analysis (MBS vs MCORP).
components.forms: Data Entry Forms using Shadcn Input, Select. Left-aligned labels. Sharp borders.
components.badges: Minimalist badges. Solid background for critical (90 days), subtle background with strong text for others.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-black text-white rounded-md. Secondary: bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 rounded-md.

animations.interaction: Micro-interactions on buttons and table rows (hover:bg-gray-50).
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items to reduce cognitive load on initial render.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Warning/Danger colors must use sufficiently dark hues against white surfaces.
accessibility.data_ink_ratio: Remove redundant grid lines in charts. Use non-color cues (icons + text) for risk alerts.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-pdf-button', data-testid='kpi-total-outstanding')

logos.description: Black and white abstract geometric logo for the brand

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Javascript (.js) and standard React patterns. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx).
Use IBM Plex Sans for general text and IBM Plex Mono for all numeric/metric fields to ensure tabular alignment.
Implement the 'Control Room' Grid: Use dense, flat surfaces (max 8px border radius) with sharp 1px borders. Do not overuse drop shadows.

Data visualization: Use Recharts for the Accounts Receivable Aging Analysis. Make it a stacked bar chart showing 30, 45, 60, and 90 days. Map 90 days to red (#DC2626), 60 days to amber (#F59E0B), 45 days to orange (#D97706), and 30 days to blue (#2563EB).
Sales Rep Leaderboard: Display as a table or list with avatars (use provided media URLs). Rank by collection %.
Quotation Pipeline Funnel: Display as a structured metric strip or a custom horizontal funnel using purely HTML/Tailwind.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all key informational and interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT use HTML native date pickers or select dropdowns. Use Shadcn Select and Calendar components instead.
The UI should look like a highly professional, authoritative internal tool. Keep decorative elements minimal. The focus is strictly on data clarity and contrast.
Install and use phosphor-icons for dashboard iconography, as it is standard for dense professional UI tools.
